parameters.jsCode:
// ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── // Build Tally pre-fill URL and email HTML // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── const prev = $('Generate Intake Token').first().json; const TALLY_FORM_ID = 'rj6gMX'; const params = new URLSearchParams({ token: prev.intake_token, source: 'etsy', orderNo: prev.receipt_id, p_email: prev.buyer_email, p_theme: prev.theme_label, p_package: prev.package_label, }); const tallyUrl = `https://tally.so/r/${TALLY_FORM_ID}?${params.toString()}`; const logoUrl = 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TarasGolub/evermagic/main/templates/icons/logo_email.png'; const html = `
Personalized Storybooks

Your book is almost ready! 🌟

Thank you for your order! To create your child's personalized storybook, we just need a few details about them.

It takes about 3 minutes — your email and theme are already filled in.

Personalize My Book →
What happens next
1   Fill in your child's details (3 min)
2   We create your personalized book
3   Delivered to your email within 24–48h

Questions? Reply to this email — we're here to help.
Order ref: ${prev.receipt_id}

`; return [{ json: { to: prev.buyer_email, subject: '\u2728 One step left \u2014 personalize your child\'s storybook!', html, tally_url: tallyUrl, intake_token: prev.intake_token, } }];
